_description: Golden fixture — Amber Alexander Festival Loan (Booth 23, St. Thomas Carnival 2026). Real CIF deal, signed Festival Loan Report delivered 2026-04-10. USVI carnival vendor microloan, 36-month term. Used as Tier 1 reference: festival checklist + simplified cash flow + festival report with Path A personal-income conditioning.
_pii_status: real numbers from signed memo; borrower name retained for traceability. Pre-commit: scrub before open-source.

borrower._note_start_date: Application states 4/1/2026 entity registration but 11 years of carnival vendor history. Condition #3 in memo requires clarification.

financials_business._note_basis: No historical tax returns or audited P&L. Net business income is stated revenue less scaled 2-month carnival projections (Apr-May 2026: $24,560 rev / $14,560 profit).

financials_personal._note_income: Personal income UNKNOWN at time of memo — CONDITIONED (Path A): minimum $33,604/yr required for 1.10x global DSCR. Fixture models memo baseline (zero personal income) so global DSCR matches the 0.29x FAIL verdict.

character.fraud_alert_note: 7-year identity fraud victim alert on TransUnion placed 2022-11-04. Protective, not negative.

readiness.override_directive: We will begin processing your loan

memo_ground_truth._description: Headline numbers from signed Festival Loan Report 2026-04-10.
